title: Your personalized tactical roadmap
subtitle: Leak diagnosis, weekly roadmap, curated resources, and exercises with automatic correction.

toolbar.planReady: Plan generated from your real leaks
toolbar.analysisWaiting: Please wait while the AI Coach analyzes your history.

source.gtoTooltip: Plan based on leaks with GTO analysis (solver + ranges). High precision.
source.heuristicTooltip: Plan based on heuristic engine analysis, GTO coverage insufficient. Moderate confidence.

loading.firstTime: This may take a few seconds the first time.

error.noTournaments: Import at least one tournament to generate a personalized plan.
error.aiUnavailable: The AI generator is temporarily unavailable. Your data is saved, try generating the plan again in a moment.
error.retryHint: Try again in a moment. If you haven't imported any tournament yet, import one first.

kpis.streakHint: Study every day to keep it

platform.title: Train on the platform
platform.subtitle: Drills targeted at your leaks, without leaving the product.
platform.academy: Study the theory of this leak

howTo.title: How to use
howTo.tip1: Click a leak to see the corresponding resources in the sidebar.
howTo.tip2: Follow the daily roadmap and mark the day as completed.
howTo.tip3: Solve the exercises below to reinforce each concept.
howTo.tip4: Re-import your history at the end of the week to measure the delta.

whatsapp.title: Train on WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Receive a question from this plan directly on WhatsApp. Answer, get it right, and ask the AI Coach to explain the reasoning.
whatsapp.hint: Send any message to get started · save the number on your phone
